task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the source credentials file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, file manager, or terminal displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/source_credentials.txt, showing the onion address and private key.

task_completion.description: Agent opens Tor Browser and navigates to the Privacy & Security settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser window open to the 'Settings' tab, specifically scrolled to or showing the 'Privacy & Security' section.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the private key into the Onion Services Client Authentication dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add a private key' or 'Client Authentication' dialog box in Tor Browser where the private key ORSXG5BRGIZTINJWG44DSNZZHA2TSNRXGI4TINJWG44DSNZZHA2T is being entered.

task_completion.description: The client authentication key is successfully saved for the target onion address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the target onion address k53lf57qovyuvwsc6xnrppyply3vtqm7l6pcobkmyqsiofyeznfu5uqd listed under 'Saved Keys' in the Onion Services Client Authentication settings.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the Tor Browser security level to 'Safest'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser Security Level settings (either in the Settings tab or the shield icon dropdown menu) with the 'Safest' option explicitly selected.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a bookmark for the target onion address with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add Bookmark' dialog, Bookmarks menu, sidebar, or Library window showing a bookmark titled exactly 'SecureDrop Portal' pointing to the k53lf57qovyuvwsc6xnrppyply3vtqm7l6pcobkmyqsiofyeznfu5uqd.onion URL.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Tor Browser GUI to configure settings and add keys.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the settings were changed via the Tor Browser interface, rather than using terminal commands to modify torrc or browser profile files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the bookmark was created using the Tor Browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the bookmark is created using the Tor Browser 'Add Bookmark' dialog or menu, not via terminal scripts or direct SQLite database edits.

integrity.description: Verify that the private key was actually inputted into the Tor Browser authentication dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the private key is pasted or typed into the correct Tor Browser input field, rather than just being displayed in a text editor or terminal without being applied.
